Soil/Rock Description: Concrete Slab. Brown, gravelly silty medium to coarse SAND. (FILL)
Concrete with cobbles and gravels of moderately decomposed granite and some red bricks. (FILL)
Angular Boulders, Cobbles and Gravels of moderately decomposed granite with some brown silty SAND and some red bricks. (FILL)
No recovery (gap in log between layers)

Moderately strong, brownish pink moderately decomposed, fine to moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE. Rock mass is medium spaced and occasionally closely spaced, very wide to extremely narrow, rough planar, smooth, manganese, iron oxide and kaolin stained joints, dipping steeply.
Weak to moderately weak, brownish pink fine grained and coarse, highly to moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE.
